data.title: MINIATURE MOTORS 12V Kids Electric Ride on Truck Car Remote Control, Twin 35W Motors 3.5MPH Max Speed, Bluetooth Music Player

features: This product is exclusively provided by MINIATURE MOTORS and requires assembly! The Remote Control has three speeds: 2-3.5MPH. You can't change the speed in Manual Mode
as it's set at 3.5MPH

Powerful 35W Dual Motor & Long-Lasting Battery: Watch your child explore with confidence! This ride-on truck features twin 35W motors for impressive power and a rechargeable 12V battery that delivers 40-60 minutes of continuous play. With a top speed of 3.5MPH
it's perfect for thrilling yet manageable outdoor adventures.

Parental Remote Control & Independent Driving Modes: Best of both worlds for growing kids! Let your little driver take the wheel using the foot pedal and steering wheel. For younger children or close supervision
simply take over with the easy-to-use parental remote control
ensuring safety and interactive fun for different ages.

Built-in Bluetooth Speaker & Realistic Driving Sounds: Turn every ride into an exciting journey! The built-in Bluetooth speaker allows kids to play their favorite songs and stories from your smart device. Combined with a fun horn and engine start-up sound
it creates an immersive
realistic driving experience that doubles the fun.
The Perfect Gift That Fosters Development & Fun: Certified by ASTM and CPSIA safety standards
this electric truck is an unforgettable gift for birthdays
Christmas
and more. It's not just a toy—it encourages outdoor play
boosts coordination
and develops crucial motor skills
all while sparking joyful imagination.
Safety-Engineered for Your Peace of Mind: We prioritize your child's safety as much as you do. This toy car comes with a parental remote for full control
a safety belt
and slow-start technology for stable acceleration. The spring suspension system ensures a smooth and stable ride on various surfaces.

relatedProducts.Title: Best Choice Products 12V Kids Electric Vehicle Toy Ride On Car with Parent Remote Control for Toddlers, Seat Harness, 61 lbs
relatedProducts.Features: FOR KIDS 3 YEARS & OLDER: This small yet powerful ride-on is perfect for your little racers who want to start driving like the grownups do! | POWERFUL 12V & REALISTIC DESIGN: Adjustable seatbelt, bright LED headlights, lockable doors, and grid windshield for off-road style, with a 12V motor and traction tires to ride on different terrains | MANUAL AND PARENT CONTROL: Let your child drive manually or use the remote control to safely guide them yourself; remote has forward/reverse controls | SAFE & DURABLE: Includes plastic wheels that will never deflate, plus a spring suspension system and safe, 2.8mph max speed for smooth rides on outdoor adventures | CONNECT YOUR MUSIC: A built-in AUX outlet allows kids to plug in media devices to drive while jamming to their own selection of music; OVERALL DIMENSIONS: 39.25"(L) x 26"(W) x 26"(H); Weight Capacity: 61 lbs.

Please note that it is at the company's discretion to decide if the item may be returned to a Best Choice Products Return Center. Unauthorized returns may not be accepted. Once your claim is processed and approved, please allow 5-7 business days for the request to be completed. If a replacement unit or replacement parts are requested, please be aware that the fulfillment time-frame is based on product availability.

relatedProducts.Title: Winado 12V Electric Car for Kids, Ride on Truck for Toddlers with Remote Control, Battery Powered Kids Electric Vehicle to Dr
relatedProducts.Features: 2 Control Modes - If the child can drive byself, they can drive by themselvs with pedals and steering wheel. If the child can't drive yet, parents can use the remote control to control it, ensuring the safety of your child | Small Truck Real Experience - Mini Electric Car is fully functional and reduced in size, suitable for children. This ride-on toy can bear 66 pounds, allowing your child to have a realistic driving experience, and the controls are suitable for small hands | Multifunctional Operation - Electric kids car has a built-in MP3 player, Bluetooth and LED lights, allowing children to play their favorite music or stories while driving, creating a more realistic driving experience | Long-lasting Battery - Power electric toy is equipped with a 12V rechargeable battery, which can be charged for 8-12 hours each time and has a battery life of 1-2 hours, fully meeting children's long-term outdoor game needs | Safety Assurance - Winado 12V electric truck is made of safe materials, complies with ASTM, CPSIA, and CPSC certifications, and is equipped with seat belts. It is suitable for children under 1.1 meters in height, so parents can use it with confidence

Sections.Title: Winado 12V Electric Car - A Mini Truck for Your Little Driver
Texts: Give your child the thrill of driving with Winado's 12V Electric Car. Featuring dual control modes, Bluetooth connectivity, and LED lights, mini Truck offers a realistic driving experience. With safety features like soft start and seat belts. Perfect for toddlers up to 66 pounds.
Timely Recharging Charge the battery when the power is low to maintain its lifespan. Avoid waiting until the battery is completely drained before recharging.
Periodic Charging Charge the battery every 1 month to prevent deep discharge and maintain its condition.

Is the remote control not working? The remote control needs to be paired with the vehicle for the first use. Refer to the manual for pairing instructions. If the light on the remote control stays on, it indicates successful pairing.

Initial Charge When charging for the first time, ensure the battery is fully charged for 8-12 hours to optimize performance and extend battery life. After a full charge, the runtime is approximately 1 hour.

Layout_Blocks.Text: Winado 12V Electric Car - A Mini Truck for Your Little Driver

Give your child the thrill of driving with Winado's 12V Electric Car. Featuring dual control modes, Bluetooth connectivity, and LED lights, mini Truck offers a realistic driving experience. With safety features like soft start and seat belts. Perfect for toddlers up to 66 pounds.
Timely Recharging Charge the battery when the power is low to maintain its lifespan. Avoid waiting until the battery is completely drained before recharging.
Periodic Charging Charge the battery every 1 month to prevent deep discharge and maintain its condition.

Is the remote control not working? The remote control needs to be paired with the vehicle for the first use. Refer to the manual for pairing instructions. If the light on the remote control stays on, it indicates successful pairing.

Initial Charge When charging for the first time, ensure the battery is fully charged for 8-12 hours to optimize performance and extend battery life. After a full charge, the runtime is approximately 1 hour.
